name: The Requirements Document
effect: Redirect blame from the product to the specification. This card is considered compliant.

clauses.name: SPECIFICATION PROTECTION
clauses.rule: If a defect is identified: The defect is reclassified as a requirements gap.

clauses.name: FIDELITY CLAUSE
clauses.rule: If the product matches the document exactly: The product is considered successful regardless of outcome.

clauses.name: OWNERSHIP OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: If the document was written by the same team that built the product: This card cannot be challenged this turn.

witness_quote: It did exactly what we asked for.
